message: Use UTF-8 for file I/O and add UI grid  Open files with explicit UTF-8 encoding in server.py (users file, room history read, and message/leave/appends) to avoid encoding issues. Add CSS grid layout and area classes, and update index.html to restructure sidebar/header/chat/message input into grid areas. Show header and message input on successful login via chat.js. Update room log files with additional join/leave and test messages.
